title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU · Incident Case: Net Link Aggregation
summary: Segment a campus switch fabric for staff, voice, guest, management, and redundant uplinks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net link aggregation increment in a verified switched campus configuration plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bundle compatible links with a shared aggregation protocol and verify member, hashing, capacity, and failure behavior.
Predict root bridge selection, root and designated roles, alternate paths, states, convergence, and loop symptoms.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
